overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a dark futuristic corporate interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a transition from a narrow neon-lit corridor into a grand multi-story atrium dominated by a massive red-illuminated tree sculpture, before exiting through a side corridor with digital advertising displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate corridor with red accent pillars

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through a narrow dark corridor illuminated by overhead square lights

entered.detail: square overhead light panels emitting bright white light
tall dark pillars with red neon accent lighting
sleek dark polished walls lining the corridor
white painted lines on the dark floor marking the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, dark corporate corridor with red structural pillars and overhead square lighting. The environment is sleek and modern with polished dark floors marked by white guidelines, creating a sense of approaching something significant ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-story corporate atrium with central installation

events.description: exits narrow corridor into expansive multi-level atrium with massive red-illuminated tree

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor into a vast atrium dominated by a massive red-glowing tree structure

entered.detail: large sculptural tree with glowing red branches and roots as the central atrium feature
multiple levels of balconies with glass railings overlooking the central space
horizontal cyan neon light strips running along the walls
high ceiling with geometric light fixtures and structural beams
illuminated screen showing video content on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the corridor into a breathtaking multi-story atrium. A massive red-illuminated tree dominates the center, surrounded by upper balconies and cyan neon accent lighting. The space opens dramatically from the narrow corridor, revealing the full scale of the corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: central atrium plaza surrounding the bioluminescent tree

events.description: begins turning right to circumnavigate the central tree structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the tree and circling around it to view the installation from multiple angles

entered.detail: circular red corporate logo mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the central tree, the camera circles around the massive red installation, revealing its glowing roots and the surrounding multi-level architecture. The Arasaka corporate logo becomes visible on the side wall as the perspective shifts around the atrium's centerpiece.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary corridor with digital advertising and vegetation planters

events.description: leaves central atrium and enters narrower side corridor with large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: moving past the tree toward a side exit corridor featuring digital billboards and bamboo planters

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying 'A BRIGHT FUTURE TOGETHER' advertisement
rectangular planters containing bamboo plants along the corridor wall
darker corridor entrance leading away from the atrium

segments.scene_description: Leaving the central tree behind, the camera moves along the atrium's edge toward a side corridor. A large digital billboard displaying corporate propaganda becomes prominent on the right wall, alongside bamboo planters. The environment transitions from the grand open atrium to a more enclosed corridor leading toward an exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic corporate hallway into a soaring, futuristic atrium before narrowing back into a side corridor. It begins by moving through a dark, narrow passage defined by red structural pillars and polished floors with white guidelines. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the space opens dramatically into a multi-story atrium dominated by a massive, red-illuminated tree sculpture and cyan neon accents. The perspective then circles around the glowing roots of the installation, revealing the surrounding balconies and the Arasaka corporate logo on the wall. Finally, the camera leaves the central centerpiece behind and glides toward a side exit, passing bamboo planters and a large digital billboard displaying corporate propaganda.
